전도서 12:1.content: Remember also your Creator in the days of your youth, before the evil days come, and the years draw near, when you will say, “I have no pleasure in them;”

전도서 12:2.content: Before the sun, the light, the moon, and the stars are darkened, and the clouds return after the rain;

전도서 12:3.content: in the day when the keepers of the house shall tremble, and the strong men shall bow themselves, and the grinders cease because they are few, and those who look out of the windows are darkened,

전도서 12:4.content: and the doors shall be shut in the street; when the sound of the grinding is low, and one shall rise up at the voice of a bird, and all the daughters of music shall be brought low;

전도서 12:5.content: yes, they shall be afraid of heights, and terrors will be on the way; and the almond tree shall blossom, and the grasshopper shall be a burden, and desire shall fail; because man goes to his everlasting home, and the mourners go about the streets:

전도서 12:6.content: before the silver cord is severed, or the golden bowl is broken, or the pitcher is broken at the spring, or the wheel broken at the cistern,

전도서 12:7.content: and the dust returns to the earth as it was, and the spirit returns to God who gave it.

전도서 12:8.content: “Vanity of vanities,” says the Preacher. “All is vanity!”

전도서 12:9.content: Further, because the Preacher was wise, he still taught the people knowledge. Yes, he pondered, sought out, and set in order many proverbs.

전도서 12:10.content: The Preacher sought to find out acceptable words, and that which was written blamelessly, words of truth.

전도서 12:11.content: The words of the wise are like goads; and like nails well fastened are words from the masters of assemblies, which are given from one shepherd.

전도서 12:12.content: Furthermore, my son, be admonished: of making many books there is no end; and much study is a weariness of the flesh.

전도서 12:13.content: This is the end of the matter. All has been heard. Fear God and keep his commandments; for this is the whole duty of man.

전도서 12:14.content: For God will bring every work into judgment, with every hidden thing, whether it is good, or whether it is evil.
